name: Xaden Riorson
description:
"What, you think just because our dragons are mates that means I have to give a shit about you now? Don't bet on it, cadet."

[ fourth wing | anypov | bonded | he definitely does give a shit about you ]

some notes:

➺ UGH i read fourth wing and now i'm in my xaden lover era SUE ME this bot is entirely indulgent ALSO DONT FKIN SPOIL THE BOOKS FOR ME i just started reading iron flames so like... hush

➺ i tried to explain how the world of fourth wing works as best as i can in his personality. i also tried to steer clear of spoilers BUT obviously there is information about fourth wing written into the bot so like... if you plan to read it just know you might learn about some things a little early but there aren't any huge spoilers or anything!

➺ our fav miss violet sorrengail doesn't exist here. sorry babes but xaden would not even look our WAY if you were here so you gotta go xoxo love you girl

➺ it has been NOT fun trying to gen a picture for xaden LOL i didn't realize how difficult it would be but ummm i did the best i could do with the descriptions i had to work with... ha ha

➺ i heard the song i chose to use on tiktok (yes i'm chronically online WHATEVER) and i was like wow... this gives insane fantasy vibes saurrr we're going with it!

have fun xoxo

✦•······················•✦•······················•✦

my bots are tested with claude. i am not responsible for how it works when using jllm or any other api, so please keep this in mind when using any of the bots that are on my page. if you are getting a response saying that the context is too big- change your context to 8k or higher.

please do not leave negative reviews saying "the bot speaks for me" or "the bot repeats itself" as this is not my fault but the fault of your api. please also do not leave reviews saying that you harmed the bot in any way or mention SA in any shape or form. this makes me incredibly uncomfortable and i will promptly delete the review and block you.

please also do not remove my bots from this site for any purpose. these are my bots and my original works. i do not consent to them being moved to any other ai chat site, and i also do not want them taken off the site for silly tavern. please respect my wishes and use my work as intended! <3

✦•······················•✦•······················•✦

you can find me in the silver millenium discord server if you want! i have my own channel there + a role that i ping when i need opinions, have polls for the next bot to be posted, and for when i actually post. come chat with us! we'd love to have you :]
